hero.title: Sujan K C
hero.tagline: Full-Stack Developer | Problem Solver | Tech Enthusiast

about.heading: About Me
about.text: I am a Computer Science student at Dayananda Sagar University with a passion for full-stack development, problem-solving, and building impactful projects. Skilled in Python, Java, React, Node.js, and AWS, I enjoy creating solutions that combine technical expertise with creativity.

experience.heading: Experience
list: Discord Bot Developer (Freelance, 2021–2022): Developed and deployed custom Discord bots for moderation, community management, and entertainment.
Leveraged Discord.py for API interaction, implemented custom commands and automated moderation.
Collaborated with clients to gather requirements and provide technical support.

education.heading: Education
list: B.Tech in Computer Science, Dayananda Sagar University, Bengaluru (2022–2026), CGPA: 7.05
PUC (12th Grade), S.B.R.R. Mahajana Pre-University College, Mysuru (2020–2022), Percentage: 92.3%
SSLC (10th Grade), Vijaya Vittala Vidyashala, Mysuru (2017–2020), Percentage: 98.8%

list: Fake News Prediction: Built ML models (Logistic Regression, SVM) to classify news articles as real or fake. (02/2024)
